title: [MTR4] 福岡市交4000系|Fukuoka Subway 4000 Series
description: Resource pack that adds the Fukuoka Subway 4000 Series into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
_A resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway._

# Overview
The **Fukuoka Subway 4000 Series** are trains produced by Kawasaki from 2024. A total of 18 6-car trains are planned to be produced for the Hakozaki Line and Kūkō Line, to replace the ageing 1000 series and 1000N series, which were designed in the JNR period. 
It received the Laurel Prize from the Japan Railfan Club in May 2025.

This resource pack is to add the JR 209-500 series into Minecraft with the Minecraft Transit Railway mod, made by Navi_LX9702 in 2024.

# Disclaimer

This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, Fukuoka City Transportation Bureau.
